allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.ProcessName; Path=$p.Path } })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed $_" } catch {} }; "done")
